author: Anton L10n
description: Translate notes into any of 165 languages with AI. Preserves Markdown formatting and structure. Powered by L10n.dev's AI translation API. Supports json, yaml, other plain-text formats. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: l10n.dev
manifest.description: Translate notes into any of 165 languages with AI. Preserves Markdown formatting and structure. Powered by L10n.dev's AI translation API. Supports json, yaml, other plain-text formats.
manifest.name: L10n.dev - AI Translator
